hooks.command: tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_waiting "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_working "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux refresh-client 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_waiting "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_working "1" 2>/dev/null; tmux refresh-client 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_waiting "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_working "1" 2>/dev/null; tmux refresh-client 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_waiting "1" 2>/dev/null; tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_working "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux refresh-client 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_waiting "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux set -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_working "0" 2>/dev/null; tmux refresh-client 2>/dev/null || true
